scripts.dev:web: [ -d apps/web ] && npm --workspace @swe-midterm/web run dev || echo "apps/web is not present on this branch"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @swe-midterm/contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace @swe-midterm/api run typecheck && ([ -d apps/web ] && npm --workspace @swe-midterm/web run typecheck || true)
scripts.build: npm --workspace @swe-midterm/contracts run build && ([ -d apps/web ] && npm --workspace @swe-midterm/web run build || true)
